prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia sorts feature cards into two columns on a wall: basic goals and bonus goals. Basic cards: "每日运行", "回测", "可视化", "新指标", "AI 报告". Bonus cards: "机器学习", "加速", "港美股", "自然语言策略", "参数优化". She pins the cards with red pins.

Core meaning: the system scope expands from simple stock picking into a full toolchain.

Style: editorial hand-drawn Chinese blog illustration, white space, black/red/white, small blue check marks. Minimal labels: "基本任务", "加分项", "范围变大".

Avoid PPT checklist look, avoid too much tiny text, avoid stock recommendation visuals.
